name: alarm-choir
description: Layered siren-like ugly voices that gather into a harsh spatial chorus.

sections.name: call
sections.intent: Separated alarm voices enter from different speaker families.

sections.name: choir
sections.intent: The sound field fills with clashing sustained and transient alarms.

sections.name: evacuation
sections.intent: Catastrophic accents push the scene into full failure.

example_command: cargo run -- piece --output out/alarm-choir.wav --scene alarm-choir --random-preset catastrophic --seed 44004
